meta.title: Toon Studio | Animation Studio and Creative Agency in Sri Lanka
meta.description: Toon Studio is a Sri Lankan animation studio and creative agency specialising in animation, video production, creative design, comics and social media campaigns.

hero.subtitle: Sri Lanka's premium animation studio & creative agency — turning imagination into motion since 2018.

whoWeAre.label: ( Who are we? )
whoWeAre.headline: We are a bunch of daydreamers gathered around to tell wonderful stories.
whoWeAre.description: We are Sri Lanka's premium animation studio and creative agency — turning imagination into motion since 2018.

featuredPage.title: Featured stories
featuredPage.subtitle: Toon Studio in the news — interviews, features, and industry coverage from Sri Lanka and beyond.

pressFeatures.title: Toon Studio on breathing new life into traditional animation
pressFeatures.excerpt: Toon Studio is an animation studio and creative agency founded by Harith and Chamith Kumarasinghe, specialising in frame-by-frame animation and creative storytelling.

pressFeatures.title: Where is the Sri Lankan cartoon and animation industry heading to?
pressFeatures.excerpt: From Dr. Dolittle to Tintin, ThunderCats to He-Man, and the Ninja Turtles to Scooby-Doo, Sri Lankans of all ages would recall fondly....

strength.label: Our strength
strength.headline: Think bold. Think big.
paragraphs: Creativity is our major strength and passion. We love to think bold, think big, and think unique.
We are a bunch of storytellers with unique skill sets in every area of production.
Active in the industry since 2018, we are well-equipped with experience we bring to every future work.
strength.quote: We are here to help build brands and grow companies.
strength.footer: In the rapidly changing world of marketing communications, we find it necessary to stay current with the changes that affect our clients.

services.title: Animation Production
services.description: Breathe life into your imagination with pure, handcrafted artistry. Our animation production is 100% human-driven, relying on the authentic talent of our artists to build bespoke 2D and 3D worlds from the ground up. We intentionally bypass AI in this process, ensuring that every frame, fluid movement, and character design pulses with genuine, uncompromised artistic soul.

services.title: Video Production
services.description: Capture the essence of your brand through cinematic storytelling. From the first spark of an idea to the final cut, our production unit pairs high-end cinematography with compelling narratives. We do more than just record footage—we awaken your brand's reality through the lens, delivering visually striking, cinematic content that leaves a lasting impact on your audience.

services.title:
Creative
Design
services.description: Transform abstract concepts into striking visual masterpieces. Encompassing dynamic graphic design, immersive digital art, and engaging comic illustrations, our design team builds the definitive visual language for your brand. We craft bespoke, eye-catching assets designed to spark curiosity, communicate your core message, and drive a true creative awakening.

services.title:
Social
Media
Management
services.description: Turn passive scrolling into a loyal, engaged community. We engineer strategic, data-driven social media campaigns paired with scroll-stopping, tailor-made content. By actively managing your complete digital footprint, we amplify your brand's unique voice, optimize your online reach, and cultivate meaningful, lasting connections across every platform.

services.title:
Next-Gen AI
Commercials
services.description: Step into the frontier of digital advertising. Leveraging cutting-edge artificial intelligence, we produce high-fidelity, highly targeted commercials that push the boundaries of traditional media. This innovative, tech-forward approach unlocks boundless visual possibilities, allowing us to deliver stunning promotional campaigns and commercial assets at the speed of modern business.

services.title:
Web & System
Development
services.description: Engineer digital experiences that perform as beautifully as they look. From responsive websites and web applications to tailored business systems, our development team architects scalable, secure solutions built around your workflows. We combine clean code, intuitive UX, and rigorous testing to launch platforms that grow with your brand and keep your operations running seamlessly.

work.title: The Untold Story of Tamil Estate Workers

founders.name:
Harith Kumarasinghe
- Founder
founders.bio: With over a decade of experience in the creative industry, Harith is a multi-talented entrepreneur, filmmaker, and visionary. As an accomplished animator, comic artist, and author, his diverse skill set shapes the core artistic direction of the agency. In 2018, Harith co-founded Toon Studio, establishing a dynamic hub for innovative storytelling and visual arts.

founders.name:
Chamith Kumarasinghe
- Founder
founders.bio: Bringing over ten years of multidisciplinary expertise to the industry, Chamith is a seasoned producer, marketing strategist, and creative director. His exceptional eye for cinematography serves as the visual cornerstone of Toon Studio's video production unit. Driving the agency's operations forward as business manager, Chamith also leverages a comprehensive background as a senior full-stack developer, UI/UX designer, and professional content writer to ensure every campaign and digital platform is executed with both technical precision and compelling narrative depth.
